heading: Comptroller General audit and access to records
label: 1833c Comptroller General audit and access to records

children.heading: Audit of agencies or other persons performing functions under banking laws
children.label: a Audit of agencies or other persons performing functions under banking laws

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), all agencies, corporations, organizations, and other persons of any description which perform any function or activity under this Act, or any other Act which is amended by this Act, shall be subject to audit by the Comptroller General of the United States with respect to such function or activity.

children.label: A
children.text: any function or activity of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System or the Federal Reserve banks that is described in any paragraph of ; andsection 714(b) of title 31

children.label: B
children.text: any function or activity of the Federal National Mortgage Association, except as provided in .section 1723a(j) of this title

children.heading: Audit of persons providing certain goods or services
children.label: b Audit of persons providing certain goods or services
children.text: All persons and organizations which, by contract, grant, or otherwise, provide goods or services to, or receive financial assistance from, any agency or other person performing functions or activities under this Act shall be subject to audit by the Comptroller General with respect to such provision of goods or services or receipt of financial assistance.

children.heading: Provisions applicable to audits under this section
children.label: c Provisions applicable to audits under this section

children.heading: Nature and scope of audit
children.label: 1 Nature and scope of audit
children.text: The Comptroller General shall determine the nature, scope, and terms and conditions of audits conducted under this section.

children.heading: Coordination with other provisions of law
children.label: 2 Coordination with other provisions of law
children.text: The authority of the Comptroller General under this section shall be in addition to any audit authority available to the Comptroller General under other provisions of this Act or any other law.

children.heading: Rights of access, examination, and copying
children.label: 3 Rights of access, examination, and copying
children.text: The Comptroller General, and any duly authorized representative of the Comptroller General, shall have access to, and the right to examine and copy, all records and other recorded information in any form, and to examine any property, within the possession or control of any agency or person which is subject to audit under this section which the Comptroller General deems relevant to an audit conducted under this section.

children.heading: Enforcement of right of access
children.label: 4 Enforcement of right of access
children.text: The Comptroller General’s right of access to information under this section shall be enforceable pursuant to .section 716 of title 31

children.heading: Maintenance of confidential records
children.label: 5 Maintenance of confidential records
children.text: The provisions of shall apply to information obtained by the Comptroller General under this section.section 716(e) of title 31
